01_profiling_edges.sql.purpose: Match rate and uniqueness profiling for 3 candidate join edges
01_profiling_edges.sql.instructions: Run in Snowflake. Export result as CSV to results/profiling_edges.csv

02_column_profiles.sql.purpose: Null rates, cardinality, and value distributions for join columns
02_column_profiles.sql.instructions: Run in Snowflake. Export result as CSV to results/column_profiles.csv

03_value_overlap.sql.instructions: Optional. Run and export to results/value_overlap.csv
